name: Gnasher McChaos, Mayor of Whateverville
text:
When Gnasher McChaos enters, each player rolls a six-sided die; the lowest roller is your Campaign Volunteer until your next turn and really ought to top off your drink.
Whenever you roll one or more dice, Gnasher gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Once each turn, you may then flip a coin; if you win, reroll one of those dice.
{1}{R}, Roll a six-sided die. This ability costs {2} more for each term counter on Gnasher. 1 — sacrifice him, it's been a long term. 2–5 — Gnasher deals that much damage to any target. 6 — take an extra turn, put a term counter on Gnasher, and say "re-elected!"
flavorText: He ran unopposed. Mostly because nobody else filed the paperwork in time.
